zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Standish於1400年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親John De Standish55歲，母親Lora de Pilkington37歲。他於1422年與Constance Gerrard在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1445年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Standish于1400年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲John De Standish55岁，母亲Lora de Pilkington37岁。他于1422年与Constance Gerrard在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1445年在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Standish was born in 1400, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, John De Standish, was 55 and his mother, Lora de Pilkington, was 37. He married Constance Gerrard in 1422, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1445, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Standish est né en 1400, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John De Standish, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Lora de Pilkington, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Constance Gerrard en 1422, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1445, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Standish 1400 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Standish 55 und seine Mutter Lora de Pilkington 37. Er hat 1422 in England, United Kingdom Constance Gerrard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Standish è nato il nel 1400 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John De Standish, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Lora de Pilkington, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Constance Gerrard nel 1422, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1445, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Standishが1400年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父John De Standishは55歳，母Lora de Pilkingtonは37歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスでConstance Gerrardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1445年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Standish(이)가 1400년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Standish(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Lora de Pilkington(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Constance Gerrard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Standish nasceu em 1400, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Standish, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Pilkington, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance Gerrard em 1422, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1445, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Standish родился в 1400 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Standish было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Lora de Pilkington, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance Gerrard в 1422 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Standish nació en 1400, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Standish, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Lora de Pilkington, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Constance Gerrard en 1422, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1445, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
